steps.action: Code-level check: inspect CSS --primary in index.css
steps.observed: --primary: 25 95% 53% (HSL hue 25 = orange) in both :root and .dark selectors

steps.expected: Orange accent colors on CTA buttons, badges, icons
steps.observed: Demo button is orange, Log Out button has orange border, Agent-Native badge uses orange, feature card icons are orange/red. No green accents visible.

steps.expected: Create Project button is orange (not teal/green), + icon is orange
steps.observed: Create Project button is orange, + icon is orange, sidebar active state (All Projects) is orange, Grid button is orange, New Pro button is orange, stat card accents are orange. No teal/green accents.

steps.expected: Orange accents on step indicators, buttons, selection states
steps.observed: Step 1 Concept tab has orange background, progress bar is orange, Custom card has orange selection border, Develop concept with AI card has orange tint, Upgrade button is orange. No green accents.

evidence.codeCheck: CSS --primary in index.css is '25 95% 53%' (orange) in both :root and .dark. Previously was '168 76% 42%' (teal). Computed style in browser confirms '25 95% 53%'.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-005): PASS. CSS --primary has been successfully migrated from teal (168 76% 42%) to orange (25 95% 53%). All three tested pages (Landing, Home, Project Setup) show consistent orange/amber accent colors. The Create Project button and + icon on the Home page are now orange, matching the Landing page. No green accents found outside exemptions. No console errors.
